testcase.name: test_create_doula_contract_with_client_id
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_uiux_fixes_iteration112.py:275: in test_create_doula_contract_with_client_id assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Create contract failed: {response.status_code} - {response.text}" E AssertionError: Create contract failed: 422 - {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","client_name"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"client_id":"client_e5b05a2367f6","title":"TEST_UI112_Test Contract","services_included":["Birth Support","Postpartum Support"],"total_fee":1500.0,"deposit_amount":500.0,"status":"Draft"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","estimated_due_date"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"client_id":"client_e5b05a2367f6","title":"TEST_UI112_Test Contract","services_included":["Birth Support","Postpartum Support"],"total_fee":1500.0,"deposit_amount":500.0,"status":"Draft"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"},{"type":"missing","loc":["body","retainer_amount"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"client_id":"client_e5b05a2367f6","title":"TEST_UI112_Test Contract","services_included":["Birth Support","Postpartum Support"],"total_fee":1500.0,"deposit_amount":500.0,"status":"Draft"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_created_contract_appears_in_timeline

failure.message: AssertionError: Create contract failed: 422 assert 422 in [200, 201] + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_uiux_fixes_iteration112.py:432: in test_created_contract_appears_in_timeline assert create_resp.status_code in [200, 201], f"Create contract failed: {create_resp.status_code}" E AssertionError: Create contract failed: 422 E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
